_description: Form nonce auth: plain credentials with login page pre-fetch (regression test)

content.text: <html><head><title>Login</title></head><body><form id="login_form" method="post" action="##"><input type="text" name="username" size="32"><input type="password" name="password" size="32"><input name="ar_nonce" id="ar_nonce" type="hidden"><input type="button" id="login" value="Apply"></form></body></html>
